SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.plugins

Interface ClientPrivilegedI

All Superinterfaces:
fr.sorbonne_u.components.PluginI, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
ClientPrivilegedPlugin
public interface ClientPrivilegedI extends fr.sorbonne_u.components.PluginI
The interface ClientPrivilegedI declares the method signatures through which a publication/subscription system privileged user manages the its channels.

Description

Invariants

 invariant      true        // no more invariant

Created on : 2026-01-20

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    channelQuotaReached()
    return true if the component has reached its channel quota.
    void
    createChannel(String channel, String autorisedUsers)
    create a new channel of the given name with a set of users authorised to use it.
    void
    destroyChannel(String channel)
    destroy the given channel when no more messages are currently waiting to be transmitted.
    void
    destroyChannelNow(String channel)
    destroy the given channel immediately, even if the channel has still messages to be transmitted..
    boolean
    hasCreatedChannel(String channel)
    return true if the component has created channel.
    void
    modifyAuthorisedUsers(String channel, String autorisedUsers)
    modify the users authorised to use channel.

    Methods inherited from interface fr.sorbonne_u.components.PluginI

    finalise, getPluginURI, getPreferredExecutionServiceIndex, getPreferredExecutionServiceURI, initialise, installOn, isCallerRuns, isInitialised, setPluginURI, setPreferredExecutionServiceURI, uninstall

  • Method Details

    • hasCreatedChannel

      boolean hasCreatedChannel(String channel) throws UnknownClientException, UnknownChannelException
      return true if the component has created channel.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - channel to be tested.
      Returns:
      true if the component has created channel.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when receptionPortURI does not correspond to a registered component.
      UnknownChannelException - when the channel does not exist.

    • channelQuotaReached

      boolean channelQuotaReached() throws UnknownClientException
      return true if the component has reached its channel quota.

      Contract

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Returns:
      true if the component registered under receptionPortURI has reached its channel quota.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when receptionPortURI does not correspond to a registered component.

    • createChannel

      void createChannel(String channel, String autorisedUsers) throws UnknownClientException, AlreadyExistingChannelException, ChannelQuotaExceededException
      create a new channel of the given name with a set of users authorised to use it.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    autorisedUsers == null || !autorisedUsers.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of the channel to be created.
      autorisedUsers - regular expression that matches the URIs of components that must be authorised to use the new channel.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when receptionPortURI does not correspond to a registered component.
      AlreadyExistingChannelException - when the channel to be created already exists.
      ChannelQuotaExceededException - when, the user tries to exceed its channel quota.

    • modifyAuthorisedUsers

      void modifyAuthorisedUsers(String channel, String autorisedUsers) throws UnknownClientException, UnknownChannelException, UnauthorisedClientException
      modify the users authorised to use channel.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    autorisedUsers != null && !autorisedUsers.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of the channel.
      autorisedUsers - regular expression that matches the URIs of components that must be authorised to use the new channel.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when receptionPortURI or uri does not correspond to a registered component.
      UnknownChannelException - when the channel does not exist.
      UnauthorisedClientException - when the user is not the one that created channel.

    • destroyChannel

      void destroyChannel(String channel) throws UnknownClientException, UnknownChannelException, UnauthorisedClientException
      destroy the given channel when no more messages are currently waiting to be transmitted.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of the channel to be destroyed.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when receptionPortURI does not correspond to a registered component.
      UnknownChannelException - when the channel to be destroyed does not exist.
      UnauthorisedClientException - when the user is not the one that created channel.

    • destroyChannelNow

      void destroyChannelNow(String channel) throws UnknownClientException, UnknownChannelException, UnauthorisedClientException
      destroy the given channel immediately, even if the channel has still messages to be transmitted..

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of the channel to be destroyed.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when receptionPortURI does not correspond to a registered component.
      UnknownChannelException - when the channel to be destroyed does not exist.
      UnauthorisedClientException - when the user is not the one that created channel.
